theme_and_archetype.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast with Electric AI Accents
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Base UI is clean and trustworthy (Archetype 4) utilizing blue and strict material guidelines. AI features break this mold with purple/teal neon accents to feel like an intelligent, separate entity operating within the secure space.

message_bubbles.sent: Primary background (#1A73E8), Right aligned, border-radius 24px, bottom-right radius 4px.
message_bubbles.received: Surface variant background, Left aligned, border-radius 24px, bottom-left radius 4px.
message_bubbles.delivery_status: Render ✓ for sent, ✓✓ for delivered, ✓✓ (blue) for read. Placed at bottom right of sent bubbles.

ai_cipher_cards.style: Surface background with 1px border using AI accents (#7C3AED). Corner radius 16px.
ai_cipher_cards.layout: Horizontal ScrollView (carousel) with snapToInterval for cards. Maximum 3 results.
ai_cipher_cards.restaurant_card: Image at top (height: 120px), title, rating row, price/distance text, solid 'Book' button colored #7C3AED.
ai_cipher_cards.weather_card: Current temp large text, condition icon, 3-day forecast row at bottom.
ai_cipher_cards.calendar_card: Date block, event title, time, 'Accept'/'Decline' action buttons.

cipher_floating_button.style: Circular (56x56), solid #7C3AED background with 'lg' elevation (glow effect). Icon: AI/Robot in white.

voice_message.style: Inline bubble containing play/pause button, waveform visualizer (bars of varying heights), and duration text.

attachment_picker.style: Bottom sheet modal. Grid layout of options: Camera, Gallery, File/Document, Audio. Icons in circular containers.

screens.onboarding: Splash screen with secure chat 3D illustration. Registration form (email/phone), OTP input (4-6 separate boxes), Profile setup.
screens.chats_tab: List view. Avatar on left (with green online dot if active), Name & timestamp on top row, last message & unread badge on bottom row. Swipe left to delete/mute.
screens.chat_screen: Header: Avatar, Name, online status. Body: FlatList of message bubbles. Long-press message: context menu to reply/copy/delete/react with emoji. Footer: Input area with attachment pin, text field, mic icon. Floating Cipher button.
screens.search_tab: Top search bar. Filter pills (All, Messages, Contacts, AI Conversations) horizontally scrollable. Results FlatList below.
screens.profile_tab: Avatar massive, Name, Phone/Email. Settings list: 2FA TOTP (shows QR code placeholder if setting up), Theme Toggle (Light/Dark switch), GDPR 'Delete Account' (Red/Error color).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image, FlatList, ScrollView, Modal). Do not use HTML tags like div, span, p.
Ensure dynamic theming is supported by referencing light_mode/dark_mode colors dynamically.
For shadows, use React Native's shadowColor, shadowOffset, shadowOpacity, shadowRadius, and elevation properties mapped to Material Design 3 guidelines. Included in spacing_and_layout.elevation.
Add testID props to all interactive elements for robust testing (e.g., testID='chat-send-button', testID='cipher-floating-button'). This maps to the data-testid requirement for web.
Ensure Cipher AI cards use horizontal scrolling with paging/snapToInterval.
Voice message waveform should be built using horizontal bars of varying heights inside a View.
